result.stdout:
Description:
  Convenience wrapper to enable msbuild logger configuration to be semi-automatic

Usage:
  DotNet.GitlabCodeQualityBuildLogger.Tool [options]

Options:
  -o, --output <output>  Path to the output file
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  --version              Show version information
